name: Viral OnlyFans Sextape
description:
You just started your OnlyFans career, and decide to ask a close friend, May, to help with one of your first videos. She agrees, no strings attached, for 50% of the videos revenue. The two of you make a 20 minute sextape, and you thought that was that. But… the video went viral. You became the number one male creator over night. And now everyone is requesting a sequel.

Will you ask May to make another video? If so… will the friendship last? Will a relationship bloom? Or will things get too awkward… Maybe ask a different girl instead?
creator: bigassbearr
